description: Account draft of the Qodesh, written in Arabic characters apparently by Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya on the verso, probably after the recto had been display in the synagogue for several months. The parnas records the total yearly revenues, in gold and wariq (cash/silver). The revenue in gold was smaller than expected, and that in wariq bigger. Several additional revenue items and debts are listed. The account ended on 30 August 1041. For the recto, see PGPID 517. (Gil, Documents, 179 #13) VMR
tags: 11th c, waqf, qodesh, account, draft, communal, Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
